compositionGate.notes: Overall composition matches Figma design across all four variants (primary desktop, primary mobile, secondary desktop, secondary mobile). Element positions, visual weight, proportions, and layout structure all align correctly.

observations: Primary variation: Center-aligned heading in large bold italic (Anton) font renders correctly at expected size. Eyebrow text 'WELCOME TO IGNITE' visible above heading in uppercase. Description paragraph centered below heading.
Primary variation: Background image renders with gradient mask fading from visible at top to transparent, blending into green/yellow gradient at bottom -- matches Figma gradient treatment.

Primary variation: QuickNavigation bar renders as dark (charcoal) rounded container with 'I Want Support With' title in bold white italic, dropdown with white text on dark background with bottom-border only, and 'GET SUPPORT' pill button with white border -- all match Figma.

Secondary variation: Left-aligned content with 'CAREERS' eyebrow, 'Work at IGNITE' heading, description text, and 'VIEW OPEN POSITIONS' dark pill button -- matches Figma layout and element positioning.
Green/yellow gradient background covers the lower portion of both hero variants correctly, consistent across all browsers.
Layout scales proportionally from desktop. Primary hero text remains centered, secondary hero text remains left-aligned.
QuickNavigation bar maintains horizontal layout with title, dropdown, and button side by side.
No overflow or clipping issues observed.
Primary hero heading still readable and properly scaled. QuickNavigation bar maintains horizontal layout.
Secondary hero content left-aligned with appropriate spacing.
Cross-browser consistency confirmed -- chromium, firefox, and webkit all render identically at this breakpoint.
Primary variation: Heading is left-aligned and wraps naturally across multiple lines. Font size is appropriately reduced for mobile viewport.
Primary variation: QuickNavigation stacks vertically -- title on top, dropdown full-width below, GET SUPPORT button full-width at bottom. Dark rounded container matches Figma mobile layout.
Secondary variation: Left-aligned heading 'Work at IGNITE' renders at appropriate mobile size. Description text wraps naturally. 'VIEW OPEN POSITIONS' button renders as expected.
Background image mask and gradient transition work correctly at mobile width.

typography.notes: Anton font renders correctly for headings (bold italic appearance is the font's natural style). Eyebrow text renders in uppercase. Description text uses standard body font. QuickNavigation title uses heading font at appropriate size. All text sizes scale appropriately across breakpoints.

colors.notes: Dark charcoal background on QuickNavigation matches Figma. White text on dark background provides good contrast. Green/yellow gradient background matches Figma design. Button styles (dark pill for secondary CTA, white-bordered pill for QuickNavigation submit) match Figma.

spacing.notes: Spacing between eyebrow, heading, description, and QuickNavigation bar matches Figma within tolerance. Padding inside QuickNavigation container (p-8 = 32px) visually matches Figma's spacing. Gap between QuickNavigation elements (gap-12) matches the horizontal spacing seen in Figma.

layout.notes: Primary variation is center-aligned with max-width constraint (912px) matching Figma's content width of 911px. Secondary variation is left-aligned with max-width constraint (700px) matching Figma's content width of 719px. Both within tolerance.

borderRadius.notes: QuickNavigation container uses rounded-[32px] which creates the pill-like rounded corners visible in Figma. GET SUPPORT button has pill shape matching Figma.

backgroundGradient.notes: Green-to-yellow gradient at bottom of hero section matches Figma. Image mask with linear-gradient fade from black to transparent creates the proper image-to-gradient transition.

grainTextureOverlay.notes: Grain texture overlay on QuickNavigation is present as an inline SVG noise pattern with mix-blend-mode: color-dodge and opacity 0.08. The effect is subtle as intended -- barely perceptible, matching the very subtle texture in the Figma design.

chevronIcon.notes: Chevron icon on dropdown is present and visible in white. Updated to 24x24 per the bug fix. Visually matches the Figma chevron size.

crossBrowserResults.firefox: PASS - Consistent with Chromium, no browser-specific issues
crossBrowserResults.webkit: PASS - Consistent with Chromium, no browser-specific issues

bugFixVerification.evidence: Chevron icon visually appears at correct size in QuickNavigation dropdown, proportional to the surrounding elements
Grain texture overlay div present in rendered HTML with SVG noise pattern. Effect is subtle (opacity 0.08 with color-dodge blend mode) as designed

bugFixVerification.bug: Background images use media library alt instead of empty alt
bugFixVerification.evidence: Verified in Hero.php source -- alt='' is now forced for decorative background images

bugFixVerification.bug: QuickNavigation select has no accessible name when title empty
bugFixVerification.evidence: Verified in QuickNavigation.php source -- fallback aria-label='Navigation' when title is empty
